name: nfl_week_id column with year_offset applies the offset once
description: Regression for the year_offset double-shift: a column that specifies an explicit nfl_week_id list (base 2022-2024) with year_offset +1 and a year split must produce a source window floored at base+offset (2023), not base+2*offset (2024). The outer join shifts by +1; double-shifting the window silently dropped the bottom offset-cohort of base years (e.g. a 2020-rookie WR lost their 2021 next-year value).
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2022,2023,2024,2025]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years WHERE player.pos IN ('WR')), "t253a487733030c8eb6ca67f997e32161" as materialized (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", count(*) as "rate_type_total_count", array_agg(distinct player_gamelogs.tm) as teams, "nfl_games"."year" from "player_gamelogs" left join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "player_gamelogs"."active" = true and "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2023, 2024, 2025) and "player_gamelogs"."year" in (2023, 2024, 2025) group by "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."pid"), "rate_aggregate_5283cfe60e29" as materialized (select "role_union"."pid" as "pid", SUM(role_union.pts) AS measure_total, "nfl_games"."year" from (select nfl_plays.bc_pid AS pid, "nfl_plays"."esbid", COALESCE(rush_yds, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(rush_td::int, 0) * 6 AS pts from "nfl_plays" where nfl_plays.bc_pid IS NOT NULL and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023, 2024, 2025) and "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') union all select nfl_plays.psr_pid AS pid, "nfl_plays"."esbid", COALESCE(pass_yds, 0) * 0.04 + COALESCE(pass_td::int, 0) * 4 + COALESCE("int"::int, 0) * -1 AS pts from "nfl_plays" where nfl_plays.psr_pid IS NOT NULL and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023, 2024, 2025) and "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') union all select nfl_plays.trg_pid AS pid, "nfl_plays"."esbid", COALESCE(recv_yds, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(pass_td::int, 0) * 6 + COALESCE(comp::int, 0) * 1 AS pts from "nfl_plays" where nfl_plays.trg_pid IS NOT NULL and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023, 2024, 2025) and "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') union all select nfl_plays.player_fuml_pid AS pid, "nfl_plays"."esbid", -1 AS pts from "nfl_plays" where nfl_plays.player_fuml_pid IS NOT NULL and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023, 2024, 2025) and "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG')) as "role_union" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "role_union"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2023, 2024, 2025) group by "role_union"."pid", "nfl_games"."year" having SUM(role_union.pts) > 0) select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, CAST(MAX(rate_aggregate_5283cfe60e29.measure_total) AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(MAX(t253a487733030c8eb6ca67f997e32161.rate_type_total_count) AS DECIMAL), 0) AS fantasy_points_from_plays_0, "player_years"."year", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "t253a487733030c8eb6ca67f997e32161" on "t253a487733030c8eb6ca67f997e32161"."pid" = "player"."pid" and t253a487733030c8eb6ca67f997e32161.year = player_years.year + 1 left join "rate_aggregate_5283cfe60e29" on "rate_aggregate_5283cfe60e29"."pid" = "player"."pid" and rate_aggregate_5283cfe60e29.year = player_years.year + 1 where player.pos IN ('WR') group by player.fname, player.lname, "player_years"."year", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 1000
